name: Warm Orzo, Black Beans & Smoked Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Whole onion; peeled, ends removed and chopped
1 large Clove garlic; peeled, ends removed and minced
12 ounces Red peppers; washed, cored and chopped
15 ounces Can no-salt-added black beans; rinsed and drained
9 ounces Smoked turkey breast, cut into small pieces
3/4 cup Orzo, cooked according to directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large nonstick pan until very hot.
2. Reduce heat to medium-high and add 2 teaspoons of oil.
3. Add onion and sauté until softens and begins to brown.
4. Stir in garlic as it cooks.
5. Add red peppers and cook until they begin to soften.
6. Add wine; reduce heat and continue cooking until the peppers are soft, a few minutes longer.
7. In a large bowl, whisk remaining oil with vinegar, cumin, and red pepper flakes.
8. Stir corn into the onion mixture and cook for a couple of minutes to heat through.
9. Add turkey pieces, cooked vegetables, black beans, and warm pasta.
10. Serve warm.
